data.name: HOROS - Magnifica
data.detailed_description:
Horos returns in a remastered edition - Magnifica!
The same story, now told more beautifully, with greater visual detail and brand-new animations.

Back in 2023, Horos was created in a resolution of 1920 × 1080 pixels, with animations ranging from 20 to 40 frames. That was enough… but Horos never settles for average. He always wants more. And he usually gets it. The gnomes from our workshop, led by Gruk, took this as a personal challenge and prepared a truly special version of his adventure for all Horos fans.

  • resolution increased to 2560 × 1440 pixels, with about 50% more visual detail, plus more natural rendering of hair, human skin, and clothing materials

  • new dialogue screens for all characters - the girls’ smiles and playful winks have never looked this good

  • improved sex animations - now up to 160 frames, featuring natural body movement and emotions clearly visible on characters’ faces

  • naughty climax animations - inside, on the face, on the breasts - wherever you desire

  • battle animations for enemies boldly challenging you to a duel

  • plenty of smaller animations that bring the game to life and make the world feel richer and more immersive

Additionally, we’ve expanded the storyline centered around the pirate captain Whitebones. On Mandy’s request, you’ll row to the beach of a small island, where the damaged ship Sea Viper lies anchored. Accompanied by sea shanties, you’ll board the vessel, defeat a crew of skeletons, and retrieve an artifact. Mandy will reward you for its recovery with a passionate encounter aboard the pirate ship.

NOTE: The game has been machine-translated into the following languages: Chinese, French, German, Italian, Polish, Portuguese, Russian, Spanish, and Turkish.

data.short_description: Embark on an epic adventure game fused with a visual novel and a dash of RPG elements. Immerse yourself in a captivating storyline featuring intriguing characters, engaging gameplay, and unique erotic encounters that will leave you breathless.
data.supported_languages: 英文, 法文, 義大利文, 德文, 西班牙文 - 西班牙, 簡體中文, 波蘭文, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙, 俄文, 土耳其文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphic card with at least 256 MB
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7
  • 處理器: 2.0 Ghz+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphic card with at least 256 MB
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Mac OS X 10.10+
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:

  • 儲存空間: 10 GB 可用空間
